briefing: NASDAQ fell -0.8% today while S&P 500 was flat — a classic neutral-to-slightly-negative session with no broad risk-on signal. Per strategy memory, neutral days call for preserving dry powder rather than deploying into new positions, even with 4 open slots and $577 available. All four perfect-score candidates (CAR, NKTR, AUGO, CRSP) look genuinely strong with full signal stacks, but the right cadence is to wait for a risk-on day (NASDAQ +2% or better) before entering new positions with remaining cash.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' or neutral session is when investors pull back from higher-risk assets like growth stocks and tech, often waiting for clearer signals before committing new capital. On days like today — Nasdaq down, volume thin before a holiday — the smart move is to hold cash rather than chase entries that lack market-wide confirmation. Patience in neutral conditions preserves capital for the next genuine risk-on surge.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險規避」或中性市況是指投資者暫時減少對高風險資產（如成長股、科技股）的配置，等待更明確的進場訊號。像今天這樣的行情——納斯達克下跌、假期前成交清淡——明智的做法是持有現金，而非追高缺乏大盤確認的個股。在中性市況保持耐心、守住彈藥，才能在下一波真正的風險偏好行情中把握機會。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. markets were mixed on July 3 ahead of the Independence Day holiday, with the S&P 500 essentially flat while the Nasdaq Composite slipped roughly 0.8% as tech stocks faced mild selling pressure. Trading volume was expected to be lighter than normal ahead of the July 4 market close, reducing the signal quality of any single day's price action. Investors appear to be pausing after a strong June rally, digesting elevated valuations in growth sectors before committing fresh capital.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在7月4日獨立日假期前夕走勢分化，標普500指數幾乎持平，而納斯達克綜合指數則因科技股承壓小跌約0.8%。由於市場提前進入假期模式，交投較為清淡，單日價格走勢的參考價值有限。在6月強勢反彈後，投資者似乎正在消化高增長板塊的估值壓力，暫緩新資金入市步伐。
